html:
Exclusive to:

Driftwood are naturally spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are found in the Rocky Beach Biome on the Lunar Island admidst the Ocean.

Driftwood can be chopped down with an Axe, and is a source of Driftwood Pieces and Twigs. If the taller version is felled, it leaves behind a stump, which can be dug up with a Shovel for an extra Driftwood Piece.

Trivia

  • chop
  • chop burnt
  • burnt
  • fall left
  • fall right
  • burnt stump
  • stump
  • Driftwood was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • There is an unused normal version of driftwood in the Don't Starve New Home files

Gallery

  • Burnt Driftwood.
  • Burnt Driftwood.
  • Burnt Driftwood.
  • The stump of the Driftwood tree.

“A dead tree that washed up on shore.”
–Wilson
“This tree looks super weird.”
–Willow
“Is tree from the sea.”
–Wolfgang
“The bleached remains of a dead tree.”
–Wendy
“LOG: ON”
–WX-78
“A new material may be of some use to us.”
–Wickerbottom
“The sea sucked all the good tree juice out of it.”
–Woodie
“It appears to be a piece of drifted wood.”
–Maxwell
“A rare beauty tö be sure, but tis nö Yggdrasil.”
–Wigfrid
“They're fun to climb on.”
–Webber
“This tree's spent too much time at sea.”
–Warly
“Hello, Watery Friend!”
–Wormwood
“This tree's seen better days.”
–Winona
“An old, dead tree, beached and bleached.”
–Wortox
“It drowned, florp.”
–Wurt
“Looks kind of eerie, doesn't it?”
–Walter
“That tree is long dead.”
–Wanda
Driftwood are naturally spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are found in the Rocky Beach Biome on the Lunar Island admidst the Ocean.
Driftwood can be chopped down with an Axe, and is a source of Driftwood Pieces and Twigs. If the taller version is felled, it leaves behind a stump, which can be dug up with a Shovel for an extra Driftwood Piece.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Driftwood là vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Chúng được tìm thấy ở Quần xã Bãi biển Rocky trên Đảo Mặt Trăng giữa Đại dương.
